original: `StorySizeGateConfig` in `src/config/runtime-types.ts` includes `action: 'block' | 'warn' | 'skip'` field
refined: `StorySizeGateConfig` in `src/config/runtime-types.ts` includes `action: 'block' | 'warn' | 'skip'` field

original: `StorySizeGateConfig` in `src/config/runtime-types.ts` includes `maxReplanAttempts: number` field
refined: `StorySizeGateConfig` in `src/config/runtime-types.ts` includes `maxReplanAttempts: number` field

original: Zod schema for `storySizeGate` validates `action` as `z.enum(['block', 'warn', 'skip']).default('block')` and `maxReplanAttempts` as `z.number().int().min(1).default(3)`
refined: Zod schema for `storySizeGate` validates `action` as `z.enum(['block', 'warn', 'skip']).default('block')` and `maxReplanAttempts` as `z.number().int().min(1).default(3)`

original: `DEFAULT_CONFIG.precheck.storySizeGate` has `action: 'block'`, `maxReplanAttempts: 3`, `maxAcCount: 10`, `maxDescriptionLength: 3000`, `maxBulletPoints: 12`
refined: `DEFAULT_CONFIG.precheck.storySizeGate` has `action: 'block'`, `maxReplanAttempts: 3`, `maxAcCount: 10`, `maxDescriptionLength: 3000`, `maxBulletPoints: 12`

original: `checkStorySizeGate()` returns `{ check: { tier: 'blocker', passed: false }, flaggedStories: [...] }` when `action === 'block'` and stories exceed thresholds
refined: `checkStorySizeGate()` returns `{ check: { tier: 'blocker', passed: false }, flaggedStories: [...] }` when `action === 'block'` and stories exceed thresholds

original: `checkStorySizeGate()` returns `{ check: { tier: 'warning', passed: false }, flaggedStories: [...] }` when `action === 'warn'` and stories exceed thresholds
refined: `checkStorySizeGate()` returns `{ check: { tier: 'warning', passed: false }, flaggedStories: [...] }` when `action === 'warn'` and stories exceed thresholds

original: `checkStorySizeGate()` returns `{ check: { passed: true }, flaggedStories: [] }` when `action === 'skip'` regardless of story size
refined: `checkStorySizeGate()` returns `{ check: { passed: true }, flaggedStories: [] }` when `action === 'skip'` regardless of story size

original: `StorySizeGateResult` includes `flaggedStoryIds: string[]` populated with story IDs from `flaggedStories`
refined: `StorySizeGateResult` includes `flaggedStoryIds: string[]` populated with story IDs from `flaggedStories`

original: When `action === 'block'`, the blocker message includes the story ID and instructions to run `nax plan --decompose <storyId>`
refined: When `action === 'block'`, the blocker message includes the story ID and instructions to run `nax plan --decompose <storyId>`

original: `runPrecheck()` places the story-size-gate check in the Tier 1 blockers section (fail-fast) when `action === 'block'` and the check fails
refined: `runPrecheck()` places the story-size-gate check in the Tier 1 blockers section (fail-fast) when `action === 'block'` and the check fails

original: `runPrecheck()` places the story-size-gate check in the Tier 2 warnings section when `action === 'warn'` and the check fails
refined: `runPrecheck()` places the story-size-gate check in the Tier 2 warnings section when `action === 'warn'` and the check fails

original: `src/cli/config-descriptions.ts` includes CLI help entries for `precheck.storySizeGate.action` and `precheck.storySizeGate.maxReplanAttempts`
refined: `src/cli/config-descriptions.ts` includes CLI help entries for `precheck.storySizeGate.action` and `precheck.storySizeGate.maxReplanAttempts`

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` is exported from `src/cli/plan.ts` and accepts `(workdir: string, config: NaxConfig, options: { feature: string; storyId: string })` parameters
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` is exported from `src/cli/plan.ts` and accepts `(workdir: string, config: NaxConfig, options: { feature: string; storyId: string })` parameters

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'PRD_NOT_FOUND'` when `.nax/features/<feature>/prd.json` does not exist
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'PRD_NOT_FOUND'` when `.nax/features/<feature>/prd.json` does not exist

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'STORY_NOT_FOUND'` when `storyId` is not found in the PRD
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'STORY_NOT_FOUND'` when `storyId` is not found in the PRD

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'STORY_ALREADY_DECOMPOSED'` when the target story already has `status: 'decomposed'`
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'STORY_ALREADY_DECOMPOSED'` when the target story already has `status: 'decomposed'`

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` calls `adapter.complete()` with a prompt that includes the full target story JSON, sibling story IDs and titles, and codebase context from `buildCodebaseContext()`
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` calls `adapter.complete()` with a prompt that includes the full target story JSON, sibling story IDs and titles, and codebase context from `buildCodebaseContext()`

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'DECOMPOSE_VALIDATION_FAILED'` when any sub-story has an empty `contextFiles` array
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'DECOMPOSE_VALIDATION_FAILED'` when any sub-story has an empty `contextFiles` array

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'DECOMPOSE_VALIDATION_FAILED'` when any sub-story is missing `routing.complexity`, `routing.testStrategy`, or `routing.modelTier`
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'DECOMPOSE_VALIDATION_FAILED'` when any sub-story is missing `routing.complexity`, `routing.testStrategy`, or `routing.modelTier`

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'DECOMPOSE_VALIDATION_FAILED'` when any sub-story has more acceptance criteria than `config.precheck.storySizeGate.maxAcCount`
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` throws a `NaxError` with code `'DECOMPOSE_VALIDATION_FAILED'` when any sub-story has more acceptance criteria than `config.precheck.storySizeGate.maxAcCount`

original: After successful decompose, the original story in the PRD has `status: 'decomposed'` and each sub-story has `parentStoryId` set to the original story's ID
refined: After successful decompose, the original story in the PRD has `status: 'decomposed'` and each sub-story has `parentStoryId` set to the original story's ID

original: `planDecomposeCommand()` writes the updated PRD back to `.nax/features/<feature>/prd.json`
refined: `planDecomposeCommand()` writes the updated PRD back to `.nax/features/<feature>/prd.json`

original: `bin/nax.ts` registers `--decompose <storyId>` option on the `plan` command and routes to `planDecomposeCommand()` when the option is provided
refined: `bin/nax.ts` registers `--decompose <storyId>` option on the `plan` command and routes to `planDecomposeCommand()` when the option is provided

original: When `config.debate?.enabled && config.debate?.stages?.decompose?.enabled`, `planDecomposeCommand()` creates a `DebateSession` with `stage: 'decompose'` and uses its output if `outcome !== 'failed'`
refined: When `config.debate?.enabled && config.debate?.stages?.decompose?.enabled`, `planDecomposeCommand()` creates a `DebateSession` with `stage: 'decompose'` and uses its output if `outcome !== 'failed'`

original: When the debate result has `outcome === 'failed'`, `planDecomposeCommand()` falls back to single-agent `adapter.complete()`
refined: When the debate result has `outcome === 'failed'`, `planDecomposeCommand()` falls back to single-agent `adapter.complete()`

original: When `debate.stages.decompose` is not configured, `planDecomposeCommand()` calls `adapter.complete()` directly without creating a `DebateSession`
refined: When `debate.stages.decompose` is not configured, `planDecomposeCommand()` calls `adapter.complete()` directly without creating a `DebateSession`

original: When `nax run --plan --from <spec>` generates a PRD and `storySizeGate` blocks with `action === 'block'`, `planDecomposeCommand()` is called for each story in `flaggedStories`
refined: When `nax run --plan --from <spec>` generates a PRD and `storySizeGate` blocks with `action === 'block'`, `planDecomposeCommand()` is called for each story in `flaggedStories`

original: After each decompose call, the PRD is reloaded from disk and `runPrecheck()` re-runs with `silent: true`
refined: After each decompose call, the PRD is reloaded from disk and `runPrecheck()` re-runs with `silent: true`

original: The replan loop exits early when `runPrecheck()` returns `flaggedStories` with length 0
refined: The replan loop exits early when `runPrecheck()` returns `flaggedStories` with length 0

original: The replan loop repeats at most `config.precheck.storySizeGate.maxReplanAttempts ?? 3` times
refined: The replan loop repeats at most `config.precheck.storySizeGate.maxReplanAttempts ?? 3` times

original: When all attempts are exhausted and precheck still blocks, `process.exit(1)` is called with an error message naming the still-oversized stories
refined: When all attempts are exhausted and precheck still blocks, `process.exit(1)` is called with an error message naming the still-oversized stories

original: When `action === 'warn'` (gate is non-blocking), the replan loop does not fire and execution continues to the confirmation gate
refined: When `action === 'warn'` (gate is non-blocking), the replan loop does not fire and execution continues to the confirmation gate

original: A progress log line is emitted before each replan attempt: `[Replan N/M] Decomposing K oversized stories...`
refined: A progress log line is emitted before each replan attempt: `[Replan N/M] Decomposing K oversized stories...`
